name: Pepperstone
description_short: Award-winning ECN forex broker with razor-thin spreads from 0.0 pips, fast execution, and MT4/MT5/cTrader support.
description_long:
Pepperstone is an Australian-founded forex and CFD broker that has become one of the most popular choices for active forex traders worldwide. The broker is known for its ultra-tight spreads, fast execution, and support for multiple trading platforms including MetaTrader 4, MetaTrader 5, cTrader, and TradingView.

The Razor account offers raw spreads from 0.0 pips (averaging 0.10 pips on EUR/USD) with a commission of $3.50 per side per lot ($7 round turn). The Standard account bundles the commission into a slightly wider spread starting from 1.0 pips. Both accounts have no minimum deposit requirement.

Pepperstone supports over 1,200 instruments including forex, indices, commodities, shares, ETFs, and crypto. The broker is regulated by ASIC, FCA, CySEC, and other major regulators, providing strong client fund protection. Their fast execution speeds and deep liquidity make them a preferred choice for scalpers and algorithmic traders.
pros: Fast execution speeds ideal for scalpers
Supports MT4, MT5, cTrader, and TradingView
cons: CFD trading only, no physical shares
Research and education not as deep as larger brokers
scraped_features: 99.59% fill rate with no dealer intervention
Deep liquidity from multiple Tier 1 banks
unique_selling_points: Industry-leading 0.0 pips spreads on Margin FX major pairs
99.59% order fill rate with no dealer intervention
Award-winning: Best in Forex and CFD in Australia (TradingView Broker Awards 2025)
Aston Martin Aramco Formula One partnership
